nodes.label: AI as creative idea starter and reference
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator of final design
nodes.grounding_span: I view it more as a reference, a consultant, a colleague, someone I'll get some ideas from and then I head off to work on my own

nodes.label: AI as 10x multiplier for research and analysis
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I view this sort of research and analysis and taking my abilities, resources, and time, and multiplying them by 10x

nodes.label: AI-generated content authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: we cannot let it do our work for us. If we let it do our writing then we lose our soul and personality

nodes.label: AI as writing block remedy
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that diminishes writing skill
nodes.grounding_span: I suffer from a lot of writing block, so using it to help me get started on a website article or content for a webpage is a huge help

nodes.label: AI as deep research tool for feasibility
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of unverified or misleading information
nodes.grounding_span: I love use deep research tools to help me dive into new directions for business or analyzing creative ideas

nodes.label: AI as tool for menial tasks and assistance
nodes.label_negative: AI as overused hype that diminishes human skill
nodes.grounding_span: I think the next phase is using AI as an assistant, a researcher, someone to handle menial tasks

nodes.label: Creative originality and human soul
nodes.grounding_span: anything with soul or humanity needs to be handled myself

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: we lose our soul and personality

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: when the AI helps me to do something I would not otherwise have ever done, it is a very satisfying feeling

nodes.label: Frustration with AI limitations
nodes.grounding_span: I know there have been times were I did get really frustrated with using AI, it does happen fairly often

nodes.label: Confidence in irreplaceability of human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I just don't think I need to worry about my type of high end clients using AI for what I do

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI's future role
nodes.grounding_span: I think the pendulum swung far to one side, over using AI, and now we are letting it swing the other way, and it will settle in the middle

nodes.label: Iterative visual feedback loop using screenshots
nodes.grounding_span: I uploaded a screenshot, and it immediately identified some issues

nodes.label: Domain-dependent delegation: high autonomy in creative, high reliance in unfamiliar
nodes.grounding_span: In this sort of project I am leaning much more heavily on the AI
